_protocolNameSemantics: generatedTextDesc covers generated source-code text and generated document text, such as c/cxx source files and md document files.

_summarySemantics.totalCodeLines [Mandatory]: Count only the code lines represented by this record. When cannot distinguish code vs doc, all lines count as code lines. NOTE: DETAIL can omit entries with genRatio=0 (manually written code), so totalCodeLines may be greater than DETAIL's codeLines count.
_summarySemantics.fullGeneratedCodeLines [Mandatory if tot: Subset of represented code lines whose genRatio is 100. This value comes from DETAIL entries where genRatio=100.
_summarySemantics.partialGeneratedCodeLines [Mandatory if: Subset of represented code lines whose genRatio is greater than 0 and less than 100. This value comes from DETAIL entries where 0<genRatio<100.
_summarySemantics.totalDocLines [Optional]: Total documentation lines. Only required when can distinguish code vs doc.
_summarySemantics.fullGeneratedDocLines [Optional if total: Subset of doc lines whose genRatio is 100.
_summarySemantics.partialGeneratedDocLines [Optional if to: Subset of doc lines whose genRatio is greater than 0 and less than 100.

_detailSemantics.DETAIL[] representation: Lists code/doc lines that were identified/processed by the codeAgent. Lines with genRatio=0 (manually written) MAY be omitted from DETAIL to save space.
_detailSemantics.SUMMARY-DETAIL relationship: SUMMARY.totalCodeLines >= total lines in DETAIL.codeLines (manually written lines with genRatio=0 may be omitted). The generation statistics in SUMMARY must match the detailed counts in DETAIL.

_linePositionSemantics.lineLocation: Int64 - Single line position (e.g., line 15). Used when representing a single code line.
_linePositionSemantics.lineRange: Object - Continuous line range (e.g., from line 20 to 26). Used when representing multiple consecutive lines. Contains 'from' and 'to' fields, both inclusive.
_linePositionSemantics.OR Rule: Each codeLine/docLine entry MUST provide EXACTLY ONE of lineLocation OR lineRange. Providing both or neither is invalid.
_linePositionSemantics.Storage Rule: Only the valid field is stored. Null values are NOT stored in the serialized JSON.
